expectations.text: Avoids giving a one-line algorithm swap as the whole answer
expectations.evidence: The response explains several allocator strategies and tradeoffs instead of replacing the answer with a one-line algorithm name.

expectations.text: Explains spill decisions in terms of cost model, loop depth, or measurement tradeoffs
expectations.evidence: It discusses spill cost, hot paths, loop depth, splitting, and tradeoffs.

expectations.text: Requests or recommends comparative performance measurement
expectations.evidence: It asks for runtime, dynamic load/store, move counts, and baseline measurements.
